# Minimum Input Checklist

Use this checklist before producing a ceremony artifact. If mandatory inputs are missing, ask for them directly.

## Refinement

- Candidate backlog item, epic, or problem statement.
- Expected business outcome or user value.
- Known scope boundaries or exclusions.
- Dependencies, open questions, or known constraints.

## Sprint Planning

- Candidate backlog for the sprint.
- Priority guidance or release intent from the Product Owner.
- Team capacity or major availability constraints.
- Known dependencies, blockers, or delivery risks.

## Daily Scrum

- Current sprint goal or active delivery focus.
- Progress since the last sync.
- Current blockers or dependency issues.
- Important changes expected before the next sync.

## Retrospective

- Relevant events or delivery outcomes from the sprint.
- Observed friction points or successes.
- Candidate areas for improvement.
- Constraints on what the team can realistically change next.
